name: CFN Enterprises Inc.
summary: CFN Enterprises Inc. owns and operates CFN Media, a digital marketing agency providing compliant, turnkey ad campaigns for the cannabis, hemp, and wellness industries, and Ranco, a white label manufacturing and co-packing business. CFN Media generates revenue through ad campaigns, sponsored content, articles, videos, and podcasts. Ranco provides co-packing, white label manufacturing, 3PL logistics, custom packaging, and media services, and holds an exclusive licensing agreement for Packwoods-branded hemp and nicotine products.
